publishedAbstract: In the event a standalone MCG wants to migrate to a Full ODF Internal deployment, this solution will cover the process. **KNOWN ISSUE:** All steps work correctly; however, there is a cosmetic issue: JUST the OCP Console UI Storage-> Data Foundation splash page shows "2 Storage Systems" despite only 1 storage system showing in the CLI and in the YAML post-migration (See below). ~~~ $ oc get storagesystem-n openshift-storage NAME STORAGE-SYSTEM-KIND STORAGE-SYSTEM-NAME ocs-storagecluster-storagesystem storagecluster.ocs.openshift.io/v1 ocs-storagecluster ~~~ **Only One Storage System Post Migration but OCP Console Shows 2:** [image=[src="images/2_storage_systems.jpg", title="2 Storage Systems when there should be 1", alt="2 Storage Systems when there should be 1", size="LG- Large", data-cp-size="100%", data-cp-align="center", caption="2 Storage Systems when there should be 1", lightbox="true"]]
publishedTitle: Migrating From Standalone Multicloud Gateway (MCG/NooBaa) to ODF/Ceph Full Deployment (Deployed Using StorageCluster) - OpenShift Data Foundation (ODF)
